title: Translucent Object Product Render AI
sourceTitle: Translucent Object Product Render AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable translucent object product render with translucent product render with glasslike material, controlled refraction, and clean studio composition. Ultra-realistic 3D anatomical human heart crafted from semi-translucent frosted polycarbonate with a milky matte finish that softly diffuses light. Features industrial injection-molded details, subtle micro-texture, and rounded edges with precise manufacturing seams. A minimal white Apple logo is subtly embedded on the surface, understated and not overpowering. Object. Subject: an anatomical human heart interpreted as a premium translucent product object. Material Finish: semi-translucent frosted polycarbonate with milky matte diffusion and soft internal refraction. Surface Detail: rounded injection-molded seams, subtle micro-texture, softened vessel forms, and precise manufactured edges. Studio Setup: centered product render on pure white background with gentle shadow underneath. Lighting Style: diffused studio lighting, controlled plastic glow, realistic refraction, and ultra-detailed product clarity. Brand Mark Rule: replace real logos with a tiny fictional minimal mark or omit the mark entirely. Subject: Make an anatomical human heart interpreted as a premium translucent product object the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in centered product render on pure white background with gentle shadow underneath. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use single centered product object, clear silhouette, rounded manufactured seams, and no clutter around it. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in semi-translucent frosted polycarbonate with milky matte diffusion and soft internal refraction. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use white, milk translucent gray, soft internal glow, and gentle studio shadow tones. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.

Studio Setup: museum-like white product plinth, centered framing, clean shadow, and premium catalog spacing. Lighting Style: large softbox glow, gentle rim light, and believable translucent plastic scattering. Brand Mark Rule: no Apple logo or real trademark; use only an original understated maker mark if needed.
